summary: Phase 4 testing complete: Export CSV/Excel and Dashboard with KPIs, charts, notifications. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Fixed Dashboard.jsx to correctly map nested API response structure. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/export/factures?format=csv returns CSV file with correct headers
Backend: GET /api/export/factures?format=excel returns Excel file (.xlsx)
Backend: GET /api/export/factures with status filter works
Backend: GET /api/export/pointages?format=csv returns CSV file
Backend: GET /api/export/pointages?format=excel returns Excel file
Backend: GET /api/export/pointages with chauffeur/chantier filters works
Backend: GET /api/stats/dashboard returns correct nested structure
Backend: Dashboard stats includes facturation, chantiers, activite_mois, flotte, chauffeurs, contrats
Backend: Dashboard stats includes evolution_ca array for chart
Backend: Dashboard stats includes top_clients array
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns notifications with priority counts
Backend: Notifications sorted by priority (high first)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats (old endpoint) still works
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with all KPI cards
Frontend: CA du mois shows correct value (8 589 €)
Frontend: CA de l'année shows correct value (8 589 €)
Frontend: Factures en attente shows correct count (1)
Frontend: Heures ce mois shows correct value (70h)
Frontend: Chantiers actifs shows correct count (1)
Frontend: CA Evolution chart displays correctly with data
Frontend: Notifications panel displays correctly
Frontend: Top Clients section shows ranked clients with CA
Frontend: Chantiers récents section shows 5 recent chantiers
Frontend: Footer stats show contrats signés, en attente, volume
Frontend: Refresh button works correctly
Frontend: Factures page has CSV export button with correct href
Frontend: Factures page has Excel export button with correct href
Frontend: Pointages page has CSV export button with correct href
Frontend: Pointages page has Excel export button with correct href

bugs_fixed.issue: Dashboard was expecting flat API response but /api/stats/dashboard returns nested structure (facturation.ca_mois instead of ca_mois)
bugs_fixed.fix: Added extraction of nested values: caMois = dashboardStats?.facturation?.ca_mois, etc.

bugs_fixed.issue: Chart was using dataKey='ca' and 'month' but API returns 'montant' and 'mois'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed AreaChart dataKey to 'montant' and XAxis dataKey to 'mois'

bugs_fixed.issue: Dashboard was using dashboardStats?.ca_evolution but API returns evolution_ca

seed_data_creation: Used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully working: Export CSV/Excel for factures and pointages, new Dashboard with KPIs (CA mois/année, factures en attente, heures), CA evolution chart using recharts, notifications panel, top clients section, chantiers récents. The Dashboard.jsx was fixed to correctly map the nested API response structure from /api/stats/dashboard.

dashboard_stats_api.returns: facturation, chantiers, activite_mois, flotte, chauffeurs, contrats, evolution_ca, top_clients

notifications_api.returns: total, high, medium, low counts + notifications array

dashboard_notifications_panel.shows: Aucune notification when empty, or list of notifications

dashboard_top_clients.shows: Ranked list of clients by CA

dashboard_chantiers_recents.shows: 5 most recent chantiers with status badges
